description_long: This is a vertical speed limit sign featuring a rectangular white face bordered by a thin black edge and a prominent red circle enclosing the black numeral '30'. The sign is mounted on a tall, slender, dark-colored metal pole, which extends well below the sign face for secure ground installation. The front of the sign is highly visible, designed for clear readability by drivers and pedestrians. The back of the sign is plain and unmarked, with the mounting hardware subtly visible at the top. The overall construction is robust, suitable for outdoor urban environments, and the materials are weather-resistant to ensure durability. The sign is typically found along city streets or residential roads to indicate a maximum speed limit of 30 kilometers per hour.
description: A white rectangular speed limit sign with a red circle and the number '30', mounted on a tall dark metal pole. Designed for roadside visibility in urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain back of the sign and the full length of the supporting pole.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the sign face and the straight, cylindrical pole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white sign face with a red circle and the black numeral '30', clearly visible for traffic.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile of the sign and pole.
attribute_font_style: bold sans-serif, clean and highly legible, with uniform stroke width
attribute_surrounding_context: Commonly found along urban streets or residential roads, often near intersections, crosswalks, or areas with pedestrian activity.
